subcodes.first_line: O Khadijih! Hearken unto the Voice of the Dayspring of Divine Unity that calleth thee from the horizon of the Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدیجه بشنو ندای مطلع نور احدیه را که از افق سجن اعظم تو را ندا میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @love of God
